homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (very poor) to 7 (excellent).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 0
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This instrumental rock track features a fast tempo driven by a distorted guitar lead and aggressive drumming with heavy cymbals. A groovy yet powerful bass line supports the intense atmosphere, creating an energetic sound that propels the music forward.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This segment features an acapella choir performance where a lead vocalist sings in a smooth, legato style to create an ethereal and serene atmosphere. Without instrumental accompaniment, the group relies entirely on vocal harmony to establish a sense of continuity and unity throughout the piece. The dreamy quality of the music makes it well-suited for meditation or scenes depicting spiritual experiences.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This instrumental rock track features a complex and fast-paced electric guitar solo supported by a solid bass line and driving acoustic drums. The energetic atmosphere creates a dynamic soundscape well-suited for a live performance or guitar showcase. With its heavy mood and clear focus on virtuosic playing, the piece delivers an engaging musical experience that highlights the interplay between the lead instrument and rhythm section.

questions.name: Sample 9
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This segment is an intense and energetic instrumental rock track driven by a fast, powerful rhythm from electric guitars and drums. The music features a loud, aggressive sound that creates an adrenaline-fueled atmosphere perfect for video game soundtracks or high-energy scenes. Although the recording is part of a collaborative Ninjam event involving multiple artists, this specific piece stands out with its strong, driving beat and virtuosic guitar work.
